idea-plugin.name: Hoppscotch Sync
idea-plugin.description:
A plugin that syncs Spring Boot REST API endpoints to Hoppscotch Self-Hosted.

⚠️ Spring Boot (Java) only. Go, Node.js, Python and other languages/frameworks are not supported.

Features:

  • Parse @RestController and @Controller classes
  • Extract HTTP mapping annotations (@RequestMapping, @GetMapping, etc.)
  • Sync endpoints to Hoppscotch via GraphQL API
  • Multi-project/module support in a single IDEA window
  • Selective sync with checkbox selection
  • Search and filter by project name
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 1.3.0 新增: 服务端版本检测；请求 JSON 前置 Zod 校验；请求 Schema 升级至 v17；修复 body 序列化兼容性
  • 1.2.4 Fix: 请求 body 序列化时 Gson 排除 null 字段导致 web 端 Zod 校验失败
  • 1.2.3 优化: 集合树查询改为一次 GraphQL 嵌套请求，消除 N+1 懒加载
  • 1.2.2 优化: 同步状态检查新增 target 模式；集合选择器支持 target 路径显示
  • 1.2.1 Fix: 网络不通时区分「Token 过期」和「服务器不可达」; 移除设置中的帮助链接
  • 1.2.0 新增: 物理列显隐; 标题列合并入路径列; 接口列显示 @Api tag; 列宽跨会话持久化; 列显隐恢复宽度; 支持以项目及类结构生成子集合
  • 1.1.0 新增: 标题列; 支持 @ApiOperation 标题; 同步状态 serverId
  • 1.0.0 Initial release

action.text: Sync Spring Boot Endpoints to Hoppscotch
action.description: Parse Spring Boot controllers and sync endpoints to Hoppscotch
